ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but lacks some naturalness in tone, could be more direct to maintain suspicion of strangers.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Maintains consistency with the strict persona but lacks context relevance and naturalness in tone, could be more engaging to improve overall quality.
